A '''multi-detonator''' was a high-powered explosive used for maximum damage potential. Its strength could rip a starship engine into fragments. It was also less susceptible to [[damper shield]] effects than a regular [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]]. It featured a [[concussion beam emitter]], [[satellite spin piercer]], and a [[cycle wave ripper]] surrounding a [[magno-thermitic charger]] and fragmentation housing.<ref name="SWCVD">''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>

[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] was known to have used some antiquated multi-detonators.<ref name="SWCVD" />
